case_title: ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES VS. ERIC FONTES et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FONTES, ERIC
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT (RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FONTES, ERIC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1390 MARKET STREET, APARTMENT #2213, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, PARTIALLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES AS TO DEFENDANT FONTES, ERIC
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FONTES, ERIC
